parameters.name: attrclass
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: dispnext
parameters.label: Displacement to Next
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the displacement to the next vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: dispprev
parameters.label: Displacement to Previous
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the displacement to the previous vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: distnext
parameters.label: Distance to Next
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance to the next vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: distprev
parameters.label: Distance to Previous
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance to the previous vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: dirnext
parameters.label: Direction to Next
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the direction to the next vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: dirprev
parameters.label: Direction to Previous
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the direction to the previous vertex in the line strip.

parameters.name: tangent
parameters.label: Tangent
parameters.description: Output a tangent attribute for each point.

parameters.name: curvature
parameters.label: Curvature
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute containing the curvature.

parameters.name: angleperdist
parameters.label: Angle per Distance
parameters.description: Whether to output Angle per Distance.

parameters.name: continuousdir
parameters.label: Continuous Direction
parameters.description: Enable returning continuous directions for co-incident points

parameters.name: maxneighbors
parameters.label: Max Neighbors
parameters.description: When computing Direction vector, how far to look when points are in same position as next or previous points.

parameters.name: diststart
parameters.label: Distance from Start
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance from the start of the line strip.

parameters.name: distend
parameters.label: Distance from End
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the distance from the end of the line strip.

parameters.name: diststartnorm
parameters.label: Distance from Start Normalized
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the normalized distance from the start of the line strip.

parameters.name: distendnorm
parameters.label: Distance from End Normalized
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute with the normalized distance from the end of the line strip.

parameters.name: primlen
parameters.label: Line Strip Length
parameters.description: Enable addition of line strip length attribute.

parameters.name: primlenprim
parameters.label: Length Attrib Primitive Attribute
parameters.description: When on, the attribute created for the length of the line strip is a primitive attribute.

parameters.name: pointindex
parameters.label: Vert Index in Line Strip
parameters.description: Output the vertex index for each point, assuming unique.

parameters.name: numverts
parameters.label: Number of Verts in Line Strip
parameters.description: Outputs attribute for number of vertices in current point's like strip.

parameters.name: vertindexnorm
parameters.label: Vert Index in Line Strip Normalized
parameters.description: Output the vertex index normalized to 0-1 for each point, assuming unique.

parameters.name: linestripindex
parameters.label: Line Strip Index
parameters.description: Enable addition of line strip index attribute.

parameters.name: lsindexnorm
parameters.label: Line Strip Index Normalized
parameters.description: Enable addition of normalized line strip index attribute.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
